title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Jarul, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Robin as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Old guy from the bar!! My daddy got knocked into the under- world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was that woman, watch out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be scared, huh? Let me get you--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: show no Tolerance for resis- Tance!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that truly all thy Mmas can accomplish, Kirngham?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've kept the nightmare holes open!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: monsters keep pouring out of people's nightmares all over the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They come from dreams, where the idea of death doesn't exist...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means I can bring them back with a single word!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that woman up there the same as before?! She looks different!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where are Luffy and the others?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh... Luffy, zero, and Sanji- Kan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just when we need them, they're all down in the depths of the under- world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't act, we'll all end up captured...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not just going to stand here and do nothing!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
